commit_scope: Add Boundary Repair Protocol as a core Living Collective concept, linking continuous consent to stop receipts, trusted repair witness, and explicit re-entry protocol.

commands: curl -sS --max-time 5 https://pulse.coherencycoin.com/pulse/now | jq '{overall, silences: (.ongoing_silences | length), silent_organs: [.organs[] | select(.status != "breathing") | .name]}'

git fetch origin main && git rebase --autostash origin/main

Production still needs PR merge and deploy verification before the public site/API can serve the new concept from main.
